use_cases: Full-screen animated hero background for landing pages
Visual background effect for SaaS product pages
Immersive aurora-style atmosphere for media websites
Decorative animated backdrop for portfolio sites
Dynamic background component for marketing websites
ai_summary: An immersive aurora-flow animated background component built with React Three Fiber and custom GLSL shaders. Creates a mesmerizing northern-lights style effect with flowing gradient colors that animate smoothly across the screen. Uses simplex noise for organic motion and is fully responsive to window dimensions. Perfect for hero sections, landing pages, or as a visually striking full-screen background for any web application.
